invalid_request.description: The request shape is missing required service fields or contains invalid field types.

unsupported_intent.description: The document intent is outside the currently supported Army Claw operation set.

not_found.description: The requested job, response, or artifact was not found in the local service store.

not_ready.description: The requested result exists but the job has not reached a terminal state.

policy_error.description: The request violates an offline, path, backend, or safety policy.

validation_error.description: The request, job, artifact, or generated output failed contract validation.

execution_error.description: The local execution boundary failed after accepting the request.

artifact_missing.description: A required service artifact path was null, outside the task root, or unavailable.

contract_violation.description: The producer returned a shape that does not match the Task 013 service contract.
